orbo_first.plain:
"Well hello there! Its been a while since ive seen a fresh face! Where are you in from?"
[player chooses: "came in from the capital", "moving away from home", "I dont remember..."
orbo replies:
"Ah the capital, lovely city. Although ours is even more lovely! Well at least it used to be...."
"Off on your own for the first time! Well you picked the right place, this town will welcome you with open arms"
"Oh.... well no worries then, we can talk about that later"

orbo- "Let me be the first to formally welcome you into our little town. We've been a strong community spanning many generations, lots o' history in this dirt. We are a mining town first and foremost, but as of now the caves are closed. Its a real bummer for all the miners, they spend most of their time drinking at the flaming pebble now. 

I need to warn you before you go-- there are dark things lurking outside the town. Its best you stay away, but if you do need to go out there make sure you are fitted with gear. Go talk to George at the general store, Im sure he has some old equiptment laying around you can use. 

Now ive got some business to attend to, feel free to stop by with any questions you may have my friend!

george_first.plain:
George is happy to finally see a customer!
"Hey there buddy! Welcome in!"
"You must be new around here! This is Georges' general, and I am the aformentioned George. I run this shop with my wife, X. I sell all kinds of things, from health potions to ferns! I also buy just about anything, so if youre ever looking to sell come back her! Inventory is a bit low, so I am always looking for suppliers!"
"Orbo said you might ahve something for me
"Ah yes! my old adventuring kit! Sadly the misses doesnt let me go out to forage anymore, least not with all these monsters around. Itd be put to better use with you, here you go"

player "monsters"?

"Ah ive said too much! Ask orbo about it, he'll know what to say"
"Take care, come again soon"

orbo_hub.plain:
Orbo is pleased to see player
"Great you got some tools from George! Hes a very kind man, always sharing what little hes got. You know hes been having a very hard time keeping his shelves up, I wouldnt suppose you could give him a hand with that?"

player: "What about the monsters"

"Monsters! Ah its no use keeping it a secret, youll find out eventually. Thats whats been plauging our little community over the past year. We dont know where they came from, but they just keep coming. Had to fully close down the mines, although ive keep the reason secret--dont want to cause too much panic. That george though doesnt keep a tight lid on secerts. Oh well. You know, with all that gear on you look quite a bit like an adventurere. We used to have a whole guild of adventureres, delving the mines for treasure and glory. But it got too tough for them and most of them jumped ship. Its not enough to have the skill, what i need is someone who wants to help the town. You know, if you are interested in helping clear out those monsters, give sally a visit at the adventureres guild. They know the caves better than anyone id wager. 

The towns people could also use your help, some new blood is what this community needs. I've heard that Barry has been having trouble serving drinks at the pebble, maybe you could visit and see why? Kippies arcade has also been pretty quiet, are you up for some games? And of course George can use anything you can get him for his store. Quite a lot to be done in our little community, but i feel hopeful for the first time in a while because of you! "


**note if player goes to sally before doing any villager quests, she will say she doesnt trust outsiders. you need to gain reputation in order to be let into the guild. -- hence the caves arent accessable until B3

george_2a_offer.plain:
"Welcome back! Are you buyin or sellin? 'fraid I cant sell much to you"
"Unfortualetly you might have noticed that the shelves are pretty bare. I usualy have the freshest and finest producnts.... but those monsters are making it impossible to harvest!"

"Hey you look like an honest hard working type-- would you be willing to do me a favor? Could you go down south of town and pick up some wild bitterberry? It tastes gross, but has great healing effects. It looks like a long stem with purple leaves at the end. But be careful- outside of town you never know what might be around the corner."

george_2a_turnin.plain:
George lights up

"You did it! Thank the gems that brought you, we may finally be able to turn this place around!"

"I really appreciate your efforts, i knew a strong adventurer like you would have no problem there."
Gives reward
"Hey if youre ever in the mood to make a few bucks, I could always use someone to forage. Stop by again if youre interested-- or if you want to shop of course!"

barry_2b_offer.plain:
Berry notices you
"what can i get ya pal?"
player can ask for a drink, or say hows buisness.
If asking for a drink, lets have berry try to make one, but fail miserably. Hes super embarassed by it, but he doesnt know how to pour drinks! "Ah lad, i dont think im cut out for this job..... damn claudia was the one who handled the drinks" Lets make claudia his ex, who co ran the bar with him
"Say, you look mighty nimble, do you want to give it a shot?" player chooses

kippie_2c.plain:
When entering the arcade kippie does not notice you and is instead entranced by a game. when you go up to him he is saying things like "lets go" "Oh yeah!" "ahhhhhhhhaand thats how its done"

Then he finally notices you and looks away from the screen, imediatly causing him to lose

"awwwww man!!! hey brother you better have a good reason for ruining my run! That could have been a record!     ah who am i kidding, i suck!"
"Welcome to kippies arcade! Best arcade in city!"
"Im kippie, owner of kippies, and arcade game master!...... at least in some games! *embarassed"
"Man a lot of these machines havent seen new high scores in years.... itd really cheer us all up if someone were to break them. Maybe you can give them a whirl, but they aint easy. Heres a token on the house, give one a try"

droghnaut_2c.plain:
BRRRZZZTTTT**** Static *** **KSHHH**** droghnaut notices you, behind his helmet, with a speaker on the outside
"Greetings traveler!"
"I havent seen you around before, are you new to town?"
--player resoponse
"Sick dude, im also not from these parts, although my home might be a little farther....."
"Anyway what brings you in! Looking for fishing gear, fish food/tanks, or do you want to talk to my fish friends!"
player reponse
"I can hook you up with some starting gear to get you out there! The fishing here is wonderful. I just have one thing to ask, please dont hurt the poor fishies after you catch them. Fish are meant to be friends, not food. Take this portible tank with you. Its from my home planet, should keep the fish fresh and happy during your travels. If you want to make a space for your friends in your house I have plenty of tanks to choose from! And if you dont think you can take care of them, I will! I am always looking to grow my fish family!"

orbo_finale.plain:
Howdy! I've been hearing so many great things about you from the townspeople! Sounds like youve really made an impact! Your help here has been very much appricated, its not much but take this as our thanks. 

Now there is one thing id like to discuss with you, im not sure if youve run into sally or not but the fight against the monsters has been ramping up. Shes pretty distrusting of newbies, but after all youve done I made sure to put in a good word. The guild is down adventurers lately, im sure she could use your help. This monster problem..... i just feel so bad.... i mean its just so bad for our town. I'm not sure how much longer we can go on without the caves.

sally_sendoff.plain:
Sally's tough and gruff

"Hmfph......." 
Player- "helloooo?"
"Yeah yeah i see ya kid, keep yer pants on"
"Mayor orbo sent me, he said you talked"
"He stopped by, guys youre not the burnout i pegged you for. Ever swing a sword kid?"
yes no player response
yes-"well forget everything youve learned, monsters here dont play by normal rules"
no-"bout what i was expecting, we can get ya to a point where you wont get yourself killed out there"

"The monsters... they aint from this world... aint like nothing youve ever seen before. Damn magics, its those wizards faults, they probably keep these monsters as pets! ah whatever, listen here kid you need to be careful, down there, this isnt for the faint of heart."
"Me an' Al been in there most nights. cleared out that top floor, but it gets worse as you go down. We still havent found where theyre comin from, but we know its gotta be somewhere in the caves. Orbo wants us to find and destroy whatever their source is. HA like that man would even step foot in the caves these days. Oh well, thats where we come in kid. So can I count on you?"
player- yes you can
Good. Here take this. Its my old bow, can be pretty useful down there. 
Before you go though it might be a good idea to visit Xavier, wherever he might be. Oh! I actaully have somehting of his, this little stone *hands it over* he said if i found anything intesting down there to give him a call.... and he just gave me this pebble. Havent figured the damn thing out yet, wizards.... I figure itd be better in your hands. " *Obtains stone to meet xavier and gain magic spells*

sally_postclear.plain:
Well ill be damned, you actually survived. I bet all $5 you'd be missing a leg, but thats a bet im happy to lose. Youve proven yourself, howd you like to join our guild? 

Congrats kid, your this towns newest hero. But it aint all sunshine, we still have more to clear. If we stop they will just keep on coming back. I need you out there kid, you might be the best chance this towns got. 

Come back here if you need tools, weapons, or advice and ill provide. 

You did good--- dont let it get to your head kid

orbo_wrap.plain:
player tells mayor the caves are clear
"Really?! Oh what joyous news, you truly saved us! Are you hurt, was it hard?"
answer
"well nonetheless you tackled this challege like a true hero and the town is in your debt. Its not much but take this. It feels like a new dawn for our town, id like to get the miners back to work as soon as possible."

"But..... I dont know.... I just have this sinking feeling that this isnt over.... You didnt find the source did you? As long as thats still out there, im not sure if we can breath easy...."

"I, uh, I might have somewhere for you to explore. Theres a cave entrance south east of town, its hidden from view by rocks and trees, but if you find an old statue of a woman, and go direcrtly west you should run right into it. dont go telling people about it, I found it as a kid and have kept it secret ever since. I havent been since the monsters... too scared to... but you are brave! Could you see if that entrance leads anywhere?"
"Thank you so much again for what youve done for the town. We are in your debt."

han_tease.plain:
A big hatted masked man stands off to the edge of the town. silent and not talking to anyone. 

if you go up to him and talk:
"........."
"........"
"Look here, best turn around if you know whats good for ya."
player"Who are you?"
"where im from, you can get killed for asking that to the wrong man."
"ill be seeing ya, names han by the way" 
Walks off
